# parser-tolerance manifest
# Covers: Parser tolerance § (em-dash OR hyphen rationale separator;
#         duplicate DECISION_N line → first valid + warning;
#         missing DECISION_N line → per-decision abstention only, not
#         whole-output ineligibility).
#
# D2 has 2 eligible voters (claude abstains on D2 only, not whole output);
# both voted THESIS → unanimous → voted.

DECISION_1 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_2 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=2,ANTI_THESIS=0
DECISION_3 expected_disposition=voted expected_tally=THESIS=3,ANTI_THESIS=0
